description_long: This piano features a rectangular body with a light blue control panel and a wooden exterior, giving it a classic yet modern appearance. The front face displays a full keyboard with alternating black and white keys, as well as a set of colored buttons and a central display above the keys. The side panels are finished in a warm wood grain, and the top surface is flat and also wood-textured, with a blue border. The rear of the piano is plain, showing only the wood finish without any controls or keys. The instrument appears to be an electric or digital piano, as suggested by the presence of buttons and a display. No pedals or music stand are visible, and the lid is fully closed, covering the internal components.
description: A rectangular, wood-finished piano with a blue control panel, full keyboard, and colored buttons, featuring a flat top and no visible pedals or music stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, blue control panel with buttons, and central display.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wood grain panel and the depth of the piano body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wood finish with no controls or keys visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wood grain panel and a partial view of the keyboard and control panel.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard piano keyboard with alternating white and black keys, approximately 37 keys in total, no split or missing keys.
